task_snapshot.title: Migration seed init baseline and bootstrap-admin evidence flow
acceptance: Defines an auditable release-chain flow for pnpm db:migrate, ALLOW_PRODUCTION_SEED=yes pnpm db:seed:prod, first db:check:init, db:bootstrap:admin, and second db:check:init.
Records command preconditions, required approvals, target-environment evidence fields, failure-stop behavior, and rollback/backup dependencies.
Separates production seed from dev seed and explicitly documents that no seed or migration is executed in this task without approval.
Includes a No-Go rule for migration failure, checksum/history conflict, seed failure, bootstrap-admin failure, or baseline failure.
Does not modify migrations, seeds, database schema, deploy scripts, production env, or business code.
task_snapshot.blocked_reason: deferred while AGENT_PLATFORM_V2 P0 work is in progress
task_snapshot.resume_condition: Unblock only after AGENT-PLATFORM-V2-A5-EVENT-SOURCING-ARCH is completed/audited or the user explicitly resumes PROD-EVIDENCE-20260621-002.
